title: Warelay -> OpenClaw
author: Simon Willison
content:
16th May 2026

In preparation for a lightning talk I'm giving at PyCon US this afternoon I decided to figure out how many names OpenClaw has actually had since that first commit back in November.

Thanks to this first_line_history.py tool (code here) the answer, according to the Git history of the OpenClaw README, is:

Warelay → CLAWDIS → CLAWDBOT → Clawdbot → Moltbot →🦞 OpenClaw

Or in detail (the output from the tool):

2025-11-24T11:23:15+01:00 16dfc1 # Warelay — WhatsApp Relay CLI (Twilio)
2025-11-24T11:41:37+01:00 d4153d # 📡 Warelay — WhatsApp Relay CLI (Twilio)
2025-11-24T17:47:57+01:00 343ef9 # 📡 warelay — WhatsApp Relay CLI (Twilio)
2025-11-25T04:44:10+01:00 14b3c6 # 📡 warelay — WhatsApp Relay CLI
2025-11-25T12:48:40+01:00 481402 # 📡 warelay — Send, receive, and auto-reply on WhatsApp—Twilio-backed or QR-linked.
2025-11-25T13:50:18+01:00 d51a3e # warelay 📡 - Send, receive, and auto-reply on WhatsApp via Twilio or QR-linked WhatsApp Web; webhook setup in one command
2025-11-25T13:51:13+01:00 4d2a8a # 📡 warelay — Send, receive, and auto-reply on WhatsApp—Twilio-backed or QR-linked.
2025-11-25T14:52:43+01:00 1ef7f4 # 📡 warelay — Send, receive, and auto-reply on WhatsApp.
2025-12-03T15:45:32+00:00 a27ee2 # 🦞 CLAWDIS — WhatsApp Gateway for AI Agents
2025-12-08T12:43:13+01:00 17fa2f # 🦞 CLAWDIS — WhatsApp & Telegram Gateway for AI Agents
2025-12-19T18:41:17+01:00 771043 # 🦞 CLAWDIS — Personal AI Assistant
2026-01-04T14:32:47+00:00 246ada # 🦞 CLAWDBOT — Personal AI Assistant
2026-01-10T05:14:09+01:00 cdb915 # 🦞 Clawdbot — Personal AI Assistant
2026-01-27T13:37:47-05:00 3fe4b2 # 🦞 Moltbot — Personal AI Assistant
2026-01-30T03:15:10+01:00 9a7160 # 🦞 OpenClaw — Personal AI Assistant
aiSummary: Simon Willison 通过 Git README 追溯了 OpenClaw 项目的命名历史，揭示了六个月间从 'Warelay' 到 'OpenClaw' 的六个不同名称。
oneSentenceSummary: Simon Willison 通过 Git README 追溯了 OpenClaw 项目的命名历史，揭示了六个月间从 'Warelay' 到 'OpenClaw' 的六个不同名称。
summary: 为准备 PyCon US 的闪电演讲，Simon Willison 使用自定义工具提取了 OpenClaw README 每次提交的第一行，记录了项目完整的命名演变过程。该项目最初名为 'Warelay'（一个 WhatsApp Relay CLI），随后依次更名为 'CLAWDIS'、'CLAWDBOT'、'Clawdbot'、'Moltbot'，最终定为 'OpenClaw'。文章按时间顺序列出了 README 标题的完整列表，展示了项目范围如何从特定的 WhatsApp 工具演变为通用的 'Personal AI Assistant'。

mainPoints.point: OpenClaw 项目自 2025 年 11 月启动以来，经历了六次不同的名称变更。
mainPoints.explanation: 名称从 'Warelay'（WhatsApp Relay CLI）演变为 'CLAWDIS'、'CLAWDBOT'、'Clawdbot'、'Moltbot'，最终确定为 'OpenClaw'。

mainPoints.point: 项目的范围随时间显著扩大。
mainPoints.explanation: 项目最初是一个特定的 WhatsApp Relay CLI 工具，最终演变为通用的 'Personal AI Assistant'，反映了用途的重大转变。

mainPoints.point: Simon Willison 创建了一个自定义工具，用于从 Git 历史中提取每次提交的第一行。
mainPoints.explanation: 'first_line_history.py' 工具被用于高效追踪 README 变更，展示了分析项目演变的实用方法。

keyQuotes: Warelay → CLAWDIS → CLAWDBOT → Clawdbot → Moltbot →🦞 OpenClaw
为准备今天下午在 PyCon US 的闪电演讲，我决定弄清楚自去年 11 月首次提交以来，OpenClaw 到底用了多少个名称。
